title: Nolok
overview: Released in 1978, Nolok is a feature-length film with a runtime of 2 hours and 23 minutes. The project was spearheaded by Shibli Sadique, who carried the creative vision of the film by serving as both its writer and director. The story is brought to the screen through the central performances of its leading cast members: Farhad, Minna Khan, and Ayesha Akhtar.
